name: www.liteputer.com.tw
message: [AI generated] Established in 1985, LitePuter Enterprise Co., Ltd. is a Taiwan-based company that specializes in manufacturing lighting control systems. It is renowned for its cutting-edge technology, outstanding quality and reliability. Besides dimmers and control systems, LitePuter offers a range of lighting solutions including architectural, professional stage, and residential lighting. Their products are marketed worldwide, and are prevalently used in theaters, TV studios, concerts and outdoor events.
